历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12933 → 9829 → 9461 → 10702 → 10797, showing an initial rise followed by stabilization. The ranking was higher in 2021 (12933), moved significantly forward to the 9400–9800 range in 2022–2023, and fell back to the 10700–10800 range in 2024–2025, stabilizing in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10797. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Physics Category was 63 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 68 in 2025, and 72 in 2026. Compared to 2024, 2025 saw an increase of 10 students, and 2026 continues with an increase of 4 students, totaling 14 additional students over two years, an expansion of about 24%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 36th in 2021, 39th in 2022, 38th in 2023, 39th in 2024, 37th in 2025, and 38th in 2026, consistently within the 35–40 range, making it a top-tier domestic science and engineering university. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was slightly negative, mainly due to a safety incident during an internship. In the 2026 cycle, the reputation was neutral/mixed, involving a naming dispute at the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as "average," with low short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application popularity. No historical admission anomalies (e.g., gaps) have been observed for Northeastern University. Its disciplines include Control Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Software Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Materials Science and Engineering A-. A total of 6 disciplines are rated A- or above, with Control Science and Engineering being A+, closely matching its enrollment majors such as Automation, Artificial Intelligence, and Robotics Engineering, strongly attracting applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular, closely aligning with Northeastern University's strengths, increasing competition for related programs. The total number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 347,000 in 2026, a rise of about 68%, with 2026 seeing an increase of approximately 27,000 over 2025 (+8.4%), intensifying competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, far from Hunan, requiring cross-province study. Its enrollment share in Hunan Physics Category is about 0.02% (72 students out of 347,000 examinees), a normal scale for an out-of-province 985 university. Local examinees may have some regional preference differences regarding universities in Northeast China, but the 985 level is sufficient to offset regional concerns.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10797, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 4 students (+5.88%), the increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees by about 8.4%, and the sustained high popularity of majors corresponding to advantageous disciplines, the mitigating effect of expansion is partially offset by the increase in examinees and the appeal of popular majors. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11228, with a range of 10728–11728.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 10728–11728, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Robotics Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mathematics Class), use Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence Future Technology College, Computer Science and Technology, Automation Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Mechanical Class, Materials Class, Engineering Pilot Class) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<10728), focus on reaching for top-tier flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>11728), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2157 → 2366 → 2629 → 2528 → 2747, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The ranking was best in 2021 (2157), then gradually moved backward, reaching the highest value of 2747 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 590 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2747; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 17 in 2025, and 16 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student (-5.88%), returning to the 2021–2022 level, with slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is stable in the 35–40 range, belonging to a top-tier domestic science and engineering university. Although it excels in science and engineering, the 985 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was slightly negative (internship safety incident), while in the 2026 cycle it is neutral/mixed. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with an evaluation of 'average,' showing no significant popularity boost. No signs of a ranking gap for Northeastern University are seen in historical admission anomaly records; Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Control A+, Computer Science A, Metallurgy A, etc.), while the History Category enrollment majors (Public Administration, Humanities Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no directly corresponding A-class discipline support, making disciplinary appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category enrollment majors, the social popularity of Foreign Languages and Literature is 'generally wait-and-see,' while the popularity of Public Administration and Humanities Experimental Class related categories is stable. The total number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 187,000 in 2026, with a significant increase of about 44,000 candidates (+31.2%) in 2026 compared to 2025, markedly intensifying competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, far from Hunan Province. The university enrolls only 16 students in History Category in Hunan, a relatively small proportion. Cross-province attendance at a 985 university still holds some appeal for liberal arts candidates, but geographical distance may influence some candidates' choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2747, the reduction of 1 student in 2026 (-5.88%), the significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category candidates in Hunan Province, and the relatively weak disciplinary support for liberal arts majors, the competition intensification effect is significant. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2730, with a range of 2239–3221.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2239), prioritize reaching for Tier 1; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3221), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.
